LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. DEFENDANT VIOLET GRAYSON'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 11, 2008 PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. BOTH PARTIES TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
ORDER SUSTAINING DEMURRER WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND, AND DISMISSING CASE WITH PREJUDICE (NO SASE PROVIDED; COPY IN D.302 OUTBOX)
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT VIOLET GRAYSON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. UNDER FRACASSE V BRENT (1972) 6 C 30784 PLAINTIFF HAS NO CLAIM BASED ON THE CONTINGENT FEE AGREEMENT. FROM THE COMPLAINT, IT APPEARS THAT PLAINTIFF'S WITHDRAWAL WAS WITHOUT JUST CAUSE AND WAS NOT THE RESULT OF THE CLIENT DISMISSAL OF PLAINTIFF. AS A CONSEQUENCE, PLAINTIFF CANNOT STATE A CLAIM FOR QUANTUM MERUIT. ESTATE OF FALCO (1987) 188 CAL APP 3D 1004. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-11-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT VIOLET GRAYSON'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION. 1ST, 7TH AND 8TH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE NOT COGNIZABLE BECAUSE THE FIRST AND SECOND JET STAR ACTIONS ARE NOT THE SAME AND PLAINTIFF WAS DISBARRED PRIOR TO THE FILING OF THE SECOND ACTION. THE 2ND, 3RD, 4TH AND 6TH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE TIME-BARRED. CCP 340.6. THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION IS BARRED DUE TO LACK OF LEGALLY COGNIZABLE RELIANCE ON THE ALLEGED FRAUD. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-23-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT VIOLET GRAYSON'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend as to all causes of action. 1st, 7th and 8th causes of action are not cognizable because the first and second Jet Star actions are not the same and plaintiff was disbarred prior to the filing of the second action. The 2nd, 3rd, 4th and 6th causes of action are time-barred. CCP 340.6. The fifth cause of action is barred due to lack of legally cognizable reliance on the alleged fraud. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/HEK/VC) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT VIOLET GRAYSON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
APPEARANCES: DONALD W. ULLRICH, JR. (916.441.4554) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. V. ELIZABETH GRAYSON, PRO PER (415.797.2183) APPEARING ON HER OWN BEHALF.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. UNDER FRACASSE V BRENT (1972) 6 C 30784 PLAINTIFF HAS NO CLAIM BASED ON THE CONTINGENT FEE AGREEMENT. FROM THE COMPLAINT, IT APPEARS THAT PLAINTIFF'S WITHDRAWAL WAS WITHOUT JUST CAUSE AND WAS NOT THE RESULT OF THE CLIENT DISMISSAL OF PLAINTIFF. AS A CONSEQUENCE, PLAINTIFF CANNOT STATE A CLAIM FOR QUANTUM MERUIT. ESTATE OF FALCO (1987) 188 CAL APP 3D 1004. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/KD) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA A. TORREANO, CSR #8600
